name: In West Valley City, how's fault figured in respiratory exposure cases?

mainEntity.name: In West Valley City, how's fault figured in respiratory exposure cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault in comp; just prove work link[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is no-fault—employer covers if work-related, no proving negligence needed. OSHA violations strengthen but aren't required[1][2]. Utah follows this. - Third-party suits need negligence. File comp regardless of blame.

description: No-fault in comp; just prove work link[2].
